creator: mohacsi@niif.hu
text:
Dear FreeBSD commiters,
 	Here I send the patch for upgrade net-mgmt/nfsen to 1.3.2.

Janos Mohacsi
Network Engineer, Research Associate, Head of Network Planning and Projects
NIIF/HUNGARNET, HUNGARY
Key 70EF9882: DEC2 C685 1ED4 C95A 145F  4300 6F64 7B00 70EF 9882

On Fri, 26 Jun 2009, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of net-mgmt/nfsen,
>
> Please note that PR ports/136070 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/136070
>
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>
